---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible bug in Testio
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `testio ...`
2. With config `...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened (include error messages / stack traces).

## Environment
- Testio version: (`testio --version`)
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- OS: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)

## Additional context
Any other context (config files, sample submissions, logs).
